source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A ray of light emerges in the direction away from the optical center, 
\[\text O\], after refraction through a concave lens, as shown below.What is the path of the incident ray?

<image_1>

The respondent must infer the corresponding incident ray and then match it to one of 4 choices
This is more than direct lookup, but the problem appears to involve a single compact physics principle rather than a long chain of computation
verifiability: The item is effectively multiple-choice with 4 options (A-D)
answer_text '<image_3>' matches choice B in the provided choices mapping
